checks.cmd: nix develop --command bazel test --config=dev //tests/contracts/... && nix develop --command bazel test --config=release //tests/contracts:build_test
checks.desc: Run the complete dev contract suite and the Bazel-generated embedded build-facts test under the real release configuration.

checks.cmd: nix develop --command python3 tools/coverage/package_gate.py --run-coverage && nix develop --command bazel run //tools/coverage:package_gate -- --threshold=70
checks.desc: Regenerate the fixed M0-002 coverage population, bind LCOV to its exact source snapshot/revision and report digest, then enforce the per-package 70% gate.

Review the frozen Orus-owned canonical/API/error/limit/identity surface, C++ authority and Python parity, exact spec literals, downstream ownership boundaries, and handoff inventory per verification V6.

Audit the full handoff revision range per verification V7, reporting task-owned implementation separately from factory/audit metadata and exempting append-only historical evidence from product-source scope guards.
